/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -DAMA_ED25519_VERIFY_SHAMIR=0 -DAMA_ED25519_VERIFY_WINDOW=4 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wvla -Wformat=2 -Wformat-security -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -fstack-protector-strong -mavx2 -DAMA_HAS_AVX2 -g -O0 -g3 -DDEBUG -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libama_cryptography.so.2 -o lib/libama_cryptography.so.2.1.5 CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_core.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_consttime.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_sha3.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_hkdf.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_ed25519.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_aes_gcm.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_cpuid.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_secure_memory.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/dispatch/ama_dispatch.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/avx2/ama_sha3_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/avx2/ama_kyber_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/avx2/ama_dilithium_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/avx2/ama_sphincs_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/avx2/ama_aes_gcm_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/avx2/ama_chacha20poly1305_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/avx2/ama_argon2_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_platform_rand.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_sha256.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_hmac_sha256.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_kyber.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_dilithium.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_sphincs.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_secp256k1.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_frost.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_x25519.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_argon2.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_chacha20poly1305.c.o CMakeFiles/ama_cryptography_shared.dir/src/c/ama_aes_bitsliced.c.o
